title: Pouvoirs irlandais
text_preview: I, SEÁN MACBRIDE, Minister for External Affairs of Ireland, do by these Presents authorise and empower DENIS DELANEY, Senior Inspector, Department of Agriculture, to sign, subject to acceptance, on behalf of the Government of Ireland, the convention for the Establishment of the European Plant Protection Organisation. GIVEN UNDER MY OFFICIAL SEAL. MINISTER FOR EXTERNAL AFPAIRS DUBLIN, this fourteenth day of April, 19…

pages.text:
I, SEÁN MACBRIDE, Minister for External

Affairs of Ireland, do by these Presents authorise and empower

DENIS DELANEY,

Senior Inspector,

Department of Agriculture, to sign, subject to acceptance, on behalf of the

Government of Ireland, the convention for the

Establishment of the European Plant Protection

Organisation.

GIVEN UNDER MY OFFICIAL SEAL.

MINISTER FOR EXTERNAL AFPAIRS

DUBLIN, this fourteenth day of April, 1951.
